title: Embeddings, Vector Spaces, Similarity, and Model Contracts · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed retrieval review reconstructs embeddings, vector spaces, similarity, and model contracts from source, document, chunk, model, index, query, candidate, response, citation, evaluation, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then attacks one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for embedding-space and similarity audit after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence de…
objectives: Select an embedding model using its training objective, query/document prompts, languages, domains, dimensions, license, limits, and evaluated task fit.
Enforce model, revision, dimension, dtype, prompt, and preprocessing identity for every query and document vector.
Implement cosine, dot-product, and distance calculations and match normalization and ranking direction to the model and index contract.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Rag Embedding Limit Evidence
steps.instruction:
review case — A review RAG engineering team handles case 7300 during a public-benefits policy change. Build deterministic Python evidence to trace embedding space, dimensions, similarity, normalization, and model-version boundaries; record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Test negation, numbers, identifiers, rare terms, domain drift, multilingual queries, bias, and adversarial proximity as separate embedding limitations.

Inspect the Rag Embedding Limit Evidence trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RAG and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Rag Embedding Limit Evidence.

steps.title: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Limit Evidence
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Rag Embedding Limit Evidence: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review RAG engineering team handles case 3871 during a regulated document deletion request. Build deterministic Python evidence to trace embedding space, dimensions, similarity, normalization, and model-version boundaries; keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects; then remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Test negation, numbers, identifiers, rare terms, domain drift, multilingual queries, bias, and adversarial proximity as separate embedding limitations.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Limit Evidence.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Limit Evidence, keep Rag Embedding Limit Evidence connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test negation, numbers, identifiers, rare terms, domain drift, multilingual queries, bias, and adversarial proximity as separate embedding limitations.

hints: For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Limit Evidence, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Embedding Limit Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Limit Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A review RAG engineering team handles case 3871 during a regulated document deletion request. Build deterministic Python evidence to trace embedding space, dimensions, similarity, normalization, and model-version boundaries; keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects; then remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Test negation, numbers, identifiers, rare terms, domain drift, multilingual queries, bias, and adversarial proximity as separate embedding limitations.

For RAG and Python Record what required effort · Review Rag Embedding Limit Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: High vector similarity proves that a passage supports the requested claim.
